ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for the deceased Former Administrator and the Special Administrator
Debra Dolch.

Ms. Rasch stated that the IRS rejected the tax filings. Ms. Rasch asked the Court to treat the petition as a First Accounting, not a Final and as a Preliminary Distribution. In addition, she requested distribution of the bulk of the estate with a reserve of $150,000.00, costs, statutory fees, and attorneys fees. The Court granted Ms. Rasch's request except as to the costs and fees which are reserved until the final distribution. The matter was continued to October 8, 2008 for status. Ms. Rasch is to prepare an order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
